data.label: Suspicious
data.explanation: Sis, parang personal statement lang 'to, eh. Walang specific claim na pwedeng i-verify. So, chismis level is a bit high kasi walang laban sa katotohanan.

data.summary: Mhie, mukhang statement lang 'to about someone's identity, so walang basis para i-fact check kasi opinion niya 'yan!
data.tip: Next time, hanapin yung claims na may specific details at pwedeng i-verify using reliable sources para mas sure!

resibo.verdict: Walang mahanap na resibo si Perri... 👀

literacyLesson.summary: Mhie, mukhang statement lang 'to about someone's identity, so walang basis para i-fact check kasi opinion niya 'yan!

points.issue: Ang claim ay "I am raymond cinco," which is a personal statement, sis.
points.correction: Dapat fact-checkable yung claim, meaning may basis siya sa realidad and pwedeng mapatunayan or mapasinungalingan.

points.issue: Walang source or evidence na sinusuportahan ang claim, teh.
points.correction: Kung fact, dapat may mapagkakatiwalaang source, para mas credible ang statement.

literacyLesson.tip: Next time, hanapin yung claims na may specific details at pwedeng i-verify using reliable sources para mas sure!
